title: sambucus racemosa var. pubens
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. pubens, also known as American red-berried elder or downy elder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its berries, leaves, and flowers, which have been used to treat various health issues due to their antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa var. pubens include relief from cold and flu symptoms, improved immune function, and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be made from its berries, leaves, and flowers, although it is essential to use the ripe berries and follow proper preparation and dosing guidelines.
